title: Pokémon GO
notes: Trainers, we hope you’re enjoying your adventure in Pokémon GO! We update the app regularly with new events and features, so make sure to check the in-game News to stay up to date.

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

Summer is in full flow as we welcome July content into the stores!

- The Royal Grow Pass and Subscriber Item!
- The ever returning Voucher Dayz!
- Summer's biggest event is back with SummerFest returning!
- Dungeons calls once more... Keep your eyes ready!
- Grab your shades cuz its time for Beach Party time!
- Bug fixes & optimizations.

Stay safe & play loads Growtopians!

- The Growtopia Team

title: Honkai: Star Rail
notes:
The brand-new Version 4.3 "The Lethe Below the Living" is now available!
New Character: Mortenax Blade (Nihility: Fire)
Character Rerun: Yao Guang (Elation: Physical), Cyrene (Remembrance: Ice), Phainon (Destruction: Physical)
New Story: Trailblaze Mission "Planarcadia" - "The Lethe Below the Living"
New Events: Pixel Plane Rumble, Wispae Amusement Park, and more
Others: New maps, new enemies, new stages, and more

title: MARVEL Strike Force: Squad RPG
notes:
Bug Fixes
• Maestro's Boss Health appeared as a negative number in the Zone Preview.
• Chat messages appeared as sent, instead of pending, while sending messages with slow network connectivity.
• Breaker Event Run Scores sometimes appeared as a negative number after a battle.
• Character Upgrade Token Offers remained in the store after purchasing
• Squads weren't saving to the Age of Fear Saved Squads list.
• Displayed Chapter Boost sometimes didn't match the actual Power Boost
• The incorrect C

title: Lords Mobile: Kingdom Wars
notes:
Football fever has gripped not just the world, but the Kingdoms of Athena as well!
Take part in the Lords Ball Carnival to get an event Castle Skin, Army Skin, Route Skin, Turf Decorations, Emotes, and many more!

# Various UI adjustments:
．Guild Fest: Added special quest requirement note to Gear Crafting quests: "Must unlock the Lunar Foundry to complete quest"
．Hero Stages: Added Hero Ultimate skill range display during Auto Battle
．Revamped the Shelter's interface (Only affects Quick Battle)

title: Eternal Sword Pact
notes:
1.Visual & Engine Optimizations: Further optimized character textures and environment rendering for a smoother visual experience. 
2.UI Polish: Refined the visual presentation of selected in-game menus and item icons. 
3.Performance Enhancements: Addressed minor graphical glitches and improved overall client stability.

title: Pikmin Bloom
notes:
Thanks for playing Pikmin Bloom! New in this version:

- Adjusted the sorting order of mushrooms in the Expeditions Tab. Mushroom battles you've been invited to will continue to be prioritized. If you still have free mushroom battle tries remaining for the day, mushrooms with four or fewer participants will now be shown next.
- Minor improvements and bug fixes.

*Please download the latest version of the app from the store for the changes above to be reflected.
